properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You put Your love on the line To bear the weight of sin that was mine Washing my river of wrongs Into the sea of Your infinite love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With arms held high Lord I give my life Knowing I'm found in Christ In Your love forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With all I am In Your grace I stand The greatest of all romance Love of God My Saviour

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Mercy roars like hurricane winds Furious love laid waste to my sin

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To the One who has rescued my soul To the One who has welcomed me home To the One who is Saviour of all
